pages.title: Creeper
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Creeper donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Torso and Legs only — $(rev)no head token$(warn). Expect hiss-adjacent sillhouettes when paired with humanoid heads elsewhere.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: Torso/legs-only donors excel when another adapter supplies head voice — experiment carefully.
